scripts.test-cov: rm -rf ./coverage && mkdir -p ./coverage && node --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=coverage/lcov.info --enable-source-maps --test dist-test/**/*.test.js && genhtml ./coverage/lcov.info -o ./coverage && open ./coverage/index.html
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist dist-test node_modules yarn.lock package-lock.json
scripts.reset: npm run clean && npm i && npm run build && npm test
scripts.repo-tag: REPO_VERSION=`node -e "console.log(require('./package').version)"` && echo TAG: v$REPO_VERSION && git commit -a -m v$REPO_VERSION && git push && git tag v$REPO_VERSION && git push --tags;
scripts.repo-publish: npm run clean && npm i && npm run repo-publish-quick
scripts.repo-publish-quick: npm run inject-version && npm run build && npm run test && npm run doc && npm run repo-tag && npm publish --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org
scripts.repo-publish-dry: npm run clean && npm i && npm run repo-publish-dry-quick
scripts.repo-publish-dry-quick: npm run inject-version && npm run build && npm run test && npm run doc && npm publish --dry-run --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org
